nodes.description: CLTRN encodes collectrin, an amino-acid transport regulator listed by Orphanet as a disease-causing gene for Hartnup disease. The available cached evidence supports a gene association, while the better-supported disease-defining transporter mechanism remains SLC6A19/B0AT1.
